proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving treatment_pembrolizumab=1 have a higher objective_response rate than patients receiving treatment_pembrolizumab=0 (positive main effect).
Patients receiving treatment_sotorasib=1 have a higher objective_response rate than patients receiving treatment_sotorasib=0 (positive main effect).
Patients receiving treatment_olaparib=1 have a higher objective_response rate than patients receiving treatment_olaparib=0 (positive main effect).
Patients receiving treatment_osimertinib=1 have a higher objective_response rate than patients receiving treatment_osimertinib=0 (positive main effect).

analyses.result_summary: objective_response rate = 0.1739 on treatment_pembrolizumab vs 0.1640 off; OR=1.073, chi2 p=0.0034
objective_response rate = 0.1695 on treatment_sotorasib vs 0.1687 off; OR=1.006, chi2 p=0.8294
objective_response rate = 0.1699 on treatment_olaparib vs 0.1685 off; OR=1.010, chi2 p=0.7238
objective_response rate = 0.1655 on treatment_osimertinib vs 0.1704 off; OR=0.965, chi2 p=0.1792

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among egfr_mutation=1 patients, treatment_osimertinib raises objective_response more than among egfr_mutation=0 patients (positive biomarker x treatment interaction).
Among kras_g12c=1 patients, treatment_sotorasib raises objective_response more than among kras_g12c=0 patients (positive biomarker x treatment interaction).
Among brca2_mutation=1 patients, treatment_olaparib raises objective_response more than among brca2_mutation=0 patients (positive biomarker x treatment interaction).

analyses.result_summary: In egfr_mutation=1: rate=0.1637 on treatment_osimertinib vs 0.1657 off (diff=-0.0020). In egfr_mutation=0: rate=0.1657 on vs 0.1711 off (diff=-0.0054). Interaction logit coef=0.0240, p=0.7584.
In kras_g12c=1: rate=0.1745 on treatment_sotorasib vs 0.1664 off (diff=0.0081). In kras_g12c=0: rate=0.1687 on vs 0.1690 off (diff=-0.0003). Interaction logit coef=0.0593, p=0.4266.
In brca2_mutation=1: rate=0.1463 on treatment_olaparib vs 0.1679 off (diff=-0.0216). In brca2_mutation=0: rate=0.1706 on vs 0.1686 off (diff=0.0020). Interaction logit coef=-0.1775, p=0.2747.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher pdl1_tps is associated with higher objective_response among patients on treatment_pembrolizumab=1 (positive interaction between pdl1_tps and treatment_pembrolizumab).
Patients with pdl1_tps >= 0.5 (PD-L1 high) gain more objective_response from treatment_pembrolizumab than patients with pdl1_tps < 0.5 (positive subgroup x treatment interaction).

analyses.result_summary: Logistic interaction pdl1_tps * treatment_pembrolizumab: coef=0.5908, p=0.0000.
PDL1 high (TPS>=0.5): rate 0.2093 on pembro vs 0.1557 off (diff=0.0536). PDL1 low: 0.1642 on pembro vs 0.1663 off (diff=-0.0021). Interaction logit coef=0.3761, p=0.0000.

proposed_hypotheses.text: tmb_high=1 patients gain more objective_response from treatment_pembrolizumab than tmb_high=0 patients (positive interaction).
stk11_mutation=1 patients gain less (or zero) objective_response from treatment_pembrolizumab compared to stk11_mutation=0 patients (negative interaction).

analyses.result_summary: tmb_high=1: pembro effect=0.0295 (0.1967 vs 0.1672). tmb_high=0: pembro effect=0.0020 (0.1648 vs 0.1627). Interaction coef=0.1839, p=0.0004 (positive hypothesised).
stk11_mutation=1: pembro effect=-0.0152 (0.1578 vs 0.1729). stk11_mutation=0: pembro effect=0.0142 (0.1767 vs 0.1625). Interaction coef=-0.2111, p=0.0018 (negative hypothesised).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher ecog_ps is associated with lower objective_response (negative monotonic relationship).
Higher fatigue_grade is associated with lower objective_response.
stage_iv=1 is associated with lower objective_response than stage_iv=0.
has_brain_mets=1 is associated with lower objective_response than has_brain_mets=0.
liver_mets=1 is associated with lower objective_response than liver_mets=0.
bone_mets=1 is associated with lower objective_response than bone_mets=0.
Higher albumin_g_dl is associated with higher objective_response (positive prognostic).
Higher ldh_u_l is associated with lower objective_response (negative prognostic).
Higher nlr (neutrophil/lymphocyte ratio) is associated with lower objective_response (negative prognostic).
Higher crp_mg_l is associated with lower objective_response (negative prognostic).
Higher weight_loss_pct_6mo is associated with lower objective_response.

analyses.result_summary: Univariate logistic of objective_response on albumin_g_dl: coef=0.0907, p=0.0001 (positive hypothesised).
Univariate logistic of objective_response on ldh_u_l: coef=0.0001, p=0.5052 (negative hypothesised).
Univariate logistic of objective_response on nlr: coef=-0.0050, p=0.3842 (negative hypothesised).
Univariate logistic of objective_response on crp_mg_l: coef=-0.0049, p=0.0007 (negative hypothesised).
Univariate logistic of objective_response on weight_loss_pct_6mo: coef=-0.0385, p=0.0000 (negative hypothesised).

analyses.result_summary: Stage IV pembro effect=0.0129 (0.1604 vs 0.1475); Stage<IV pembro effect=0.0045 (0.1987 vs 0.1942); interaction coef=0.0709, p=0.1467.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with both stk11_mutation=1 and keap1_mutation=1 (co-mutated) have a smaller pembrolizumab benefit than other patients (negative interaction with treatment_pembrolizumab).
Patients with kras_g12c=1 AND stk11_mutation=1 have lower objective_response than those with kras_g12c=1 alone (joint negative effect among KRAS-mutant).

analyses.result_summary: STK11+KEAP1 co-mutated pembro effect=-0.0284 (0.1476 vs 0.1760); non-co-mutated pembro effect=0.0109 (0.1746 vs 0.1637); interaction coef=-0.2872, p=0.0632.

analyses.code: chi2 on stk11_mutation vs objective_response within kras_g12c==1

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment for ecog_ps, stage_iv, age_years, albumin_g_dl, ldh_u_l, pdl1_tps, tmb_high, stk11_mutation, the main effect of treatment_pembrolizumab on objective_response remains positive.
After adjustment, the pdl1_tps x treatment_pembrolizumab interaction on objective_response remains positive and significant.

analyses.code: smf.logit('objective_response ~ treatment_pembrolizumab + ecog_ps + stage_iv + age_years + albumin_g_dl + ldh_u_l + pdl1_tps + tmb_high + stk11_mutation', df).fit()
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted pembrolizumab logit coef=0.0762, p=0.0015. (positive direction supports h19a)

analyses.code: smf.logit('objective_response ~ treatment_pembrolizumab + ecog_ps + stage_iv + age_years + albumin_g_dl + ldh_u_l + pdl1_tps + tmb_high + stk11_mutation + pdl1_tps:treatment_pembrolizumab', df).fit()

proposed_hypotheses.text: The pembrolizumab benefit on objective_response differs between sex_female=1 and sex_female=0 (sex x treatment_pembrolizumab interaction).
The pembrolizumab benefit on objective_response declines with age_years (negative age x treatment_pembrolizumab interaction).
The pembrolizumab benefit on objective_response is smaller in patients with smoking_status=='never' than in current/former smokers.

analyses.result_summary: Never smoker pembro effect=0.0012; ever smoker pembro effect=0.0114; interaction coef=-0.0717, p=0.2892.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with both pdl1_tps>=0.5 AND tmb_high=1 gain the largest pembrolizumab benefit on objective_response.
Among pdl1_high & tmb_high, treatment_pembrolizumab=1 has objective_response rate higher than any other PD-L1/TMB stratum on pembro.

analyses.result_summary: bio_score=0 (n=28143): pembro effect=-0.0021 (0.1625 vs 0.1646); bio_score=1 (n=18707): pembro effect=0.0061 (0.1707 vs 0.1646); bio_score=2 (n=3150): pembro effect=0.1386 (0.2937 vs 0.1551). Three-way interaction coef=0.6868, p=0.0000.
Among pembro=1: PDL1high+TMBhigh rate=0.2937 vs other strata rate=0.1657. OR=2.093, p=0.0000.

proposed_hypotheses.text: egfr_mutation=0 patients given treatment_osimertinib have lower objective_response than egfr_mutation=0 patients NOT given treatment_osimertinib (mismatch reduces response).
kras_g12c=0 patients given treatment_sotorasib have lower objective_response than kras_g12c=0 patients NOT given it (mismatch reduces response).
brca2_mutation=0 patients given treatment_olaparib have lower objective_response than brca2_mutation=0 patients NOT given it.

analyses.code: chi2 on treatment_osimertinib vs objective_response within egfr_mutation==0
analyses.result_summary: Within egfr_mutation=0 (n=43483): treatment_osimertinib=1 rate=0.1657 vs =0 rate=0.1711. OR=0.962, p=0.1740.

analyses.code: chi2 on treatment_sotorasib vs objective_response within kras_g12c==0
analyses.result_summary: Within kras_g12c=0 (n=43632): treatment_sotorasib=1 rate=0.1687 vs =0 rate=0.1690. OR=0.998, p=0.9535.

analyses.code: chi2 on treatment_olaparib vs objective_response within brca2_mutation==0
analyses.result_summary: Within brca2_mutation=0 (n=48481): treatment_olaparib=1 rate=0.1706 vs =0 rate=0.1686. OR=1.014, p=0.6005.

proposed_hypotheses.text: PD-L1 x treatment_pembrolizumab interaction is preserved among patients with ecog_ps<=1 (good performance).
PD-L1 x treatment_pembrolizumab interaction is preserved among patients with albumin_g_dl above the median.

After adjustment for ecog_ps, stage_iv, age_years, sex_female, albumin_g_dl, ldh_u_l, nlr, crp_mg_l, weight_loss_pct_6mo, pdl1_tps, tmb_high, stk11_mutation, race_ethnicity, insurance_type, the pdl1_tps x treatment_pembrolizumab interaction on objective_response is positive and significant.
In the same multivariable model, race_ethnicity has no significant association with objective_response (null result).

analyses.code: smf.logit('objective_response ~ treatment_pembrolizumab * pdl1_tps + ecog_ps + stage_iv + age_years + sex_female + albumin_g_dl + ldh_u_l + nlr + crp_mg_l + weight_loss_pct_6mo + tmb_high + stk11_mutation + C(race_ethnicity) + C(insurance_type)', df).fit()
Examine race_ethnicity coefficients in multivariable logistic model
analyses.result_summary: Race ethnicity p-values in adjusted model: {'C(race_ethnicity)[T.black]': 0.97026637881167, 'C(race_ethnicity)[T.hispanic]': 0.49846186004298954, 'C(race_ethnicity)[T.other]': 0.5940704342038172, 'C(race_ethnicity)[T.white]': 0.12112703197772912}. Min p=0.1211.

proposed_hypotheses.text: In a multivariable logistic regression of objective_response, ecog_ps has a negative coefficient (lower response with worse PS).
In the same model, albumin_g_dl has a positive coefficient and ldh_u_l has a negative coefficient (canonical prognostic directions).
In the same model, the main effect of treatment_pembrolizumab is positive after adjusting for biomarkers and clinical covariates.

In the same model, treatment_osimertinib, treatment_sotorasib, and treatment_olaparib show no significant main effects on objective_response when given regardless of matched biomarker status (overall, unselected use).
